what_worked_well: Test-automator generated comprehensive test suite (16 files, 9 test categories) covering all 8 ACs
Progressive implementation: identified that 4 of 6 integrations already existed, only 2 needed new work
Consistent pattern application across all 3 modified files (same structure, same format)
Context-validator caught 0 violations - implementation followed all architectural constraints
Code-reviewer approved with no critical/high issues - only minor documentation variance noted
DoD validator pre-commit hook worked correctly - caught Implementation Notes format issue before allowing commit
areas_for_improvement: Initial assessment underestimated scope: story mentioned Step 7 for deferral phase but implementation used Step 9 (existing Step 8 required new numbering)
Test file test-ac5-phase06-deferral-step7.sh had to be updated mid-workflow to match actual step number
Implementation Notes format required iteration - first attempt missing '- [x]' prefix that validator expected
WSL file system issue caused temporary workflow interruption requiring user to restart WSL

recommendations.description: Add step number flexibility to story templates - allow 'Step N' instead of specific numbers
recommendations.implementation_notes: When specifying step numbers in AC, use 'Step N (after existing steps)' pattern to avoid mismatch with actual file structure

recommendations.description: Update dod-update-workflow.md to explicitly show '- [x]' prefix requirement in examples
recommendations.implementation_notes: Lines 600-602 show correct format but the Implementation Notes section examples could be more prominent

recommendations.description: Add pre-flight validation in Phase 07 to catch format issues before git commit attempt
recommendations.implementation_notes: Run devforgeai-validate validate-dod BEFORE staging files, not just rely on pre-commit hook

patterns_observed: Configuration-only stories (markdown updates, no code) benefit from test-automator generating grep-based shell tests
AC Checklist integration pattern is now consistent across all 6 TDD phase files
Graceful skip pattern ('DoD-only tracking') enables backward compatibility without breaking older stories

constraint_analysis.tech_stack_compliance: PASS - Only used native tools (Read, Write, Edit, Grep, Glob)
constraint_analysis.source_tree_compliance: PASS - All files in correct locations per source-tree.md
constraint_analysis.coding_standards_compliance: PASS - Direct instructions format, not prose
constraint_analysis.architecture_constraints_compliance: PASS - Reference files properly delegate to workflow files
